response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack/web developer with strong software craftsmanship background, but lacks the core requirements for this embedded security role: no native Japanese proficiency (critical hard requirement), no demonstrated C programming for UNIX/embedded systems in recent roles, no Linux kernel modification experience, and no background in LAN-switch firmware, MACsec, 802.1X, or networking protocols at L2/L3. The C/C++ experience is limited and over a decade old (National Instruments, 2014-2015).
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with TDD, CI/CD, and craftsmanship practices
Some historical C/C++ experience at National Instruments and embedded-adjacent work
Linux familiarity and DevOps tooling experience
concerns: No native Japanese proficiency — hard requirement for the role
No demonstrated Linux kernel investigation or source modification experience
No experience with switch/networking security stack (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP, chip-vendor SDKs)
